title: Blocktopia
description: Blocktopia adds many Blocks to minecraft.
body:
# Blocks

```
Needs to be updated! This is an accurate description of Blocks for 1.0 Alpha 1.
```

Blocktopia adds many new Blocks.


<details>
<summary>Legacy Blocks</summary>

-Cobblestone ![Cobblestone Rd20090515](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/884105653e8957fd6920b8e3e5bac18f964bfe43.png)  ![Cobblestone c0.0.14a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00f4c22d2c08c215f1e8ae004999b57ba38a6967.png) ![Cobblestone b1.7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b1c25f1f32581b7b066b7f449efea93d208a79e.png)

# Datapack Features
## Fluid Interactions (requires Blocktopia 4.5+)
They are located in "data/(name)/fluid_interactions/"

This is the Json Syntax (vanilla basalt generator):

    {
      "fluid": "minecraft:lava",
      "neighbor_block": "minecraft:blue_ice",
      "base_block": "minecraft:soul_soil",
      "result": "minecraft:basalt"
    }
